prestazioni: Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger upgrade for the 2.5L Smartstream G2.5 T-GDi (engine code: G4KM) with a custom 3.5-inch V-band downpipe featuring a Tial 44mm external wastegate, paired with a PTP Turbo Blanket to reduce heat soak and improve spool consistency

Full bolt-on fuel system overhaul including Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -8AN lines, and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump to support 400+ WHP on E40 blend, mated to a Cobb Accessport V3 for custom G2.5 T-GDi-specific Stage 2+ tuning with ethanol compensation

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping, custom-valved for the K5 GT’s MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension, paired with Whiteline front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and polyurethane bushings to eliminate compliance under hard cornering
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works K5 GT-specific widebody kit with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, retaining OEM paint-matched lower panels for a stealth aggressive stance, paired with a custom 3M Satin Black wrap on the roof and mirrors

Rays Gram Lights 57Xtreme 19x9.5 +30 front and 19x11 +40 rear wheels in Hyper Black, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear) with custom wheel spacers to fill the LB Works fender gaps

Seibon Carbon fiber hood with a custom 2.5-inch vent for improved engine bay heat extraction, paired with a custom LED DRL delete using OEM-style LED strips integrated into the bumper, and a custom rear diffuser with dual 3.5-inch exhaust cutouts for a pair of Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust tips
